title: New Year and Christmas atmosphere
description: Adds a New Year's atmosphere to Minecraft without affecting its basic mechanics.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f415f2c2024cb43800a231de6d288204a878979f.png)

The purpose of this modpack is to add a New Year and Christmas atmosphere to Minecraft, but not to affect its basic mechanics, but only the visual part.

What does it add?
- With the help of resource packs, there will now be snow everywhere. And there will be no rain, only snowfall.
- With the help of resource packs, the standard minecraft music is replaced with festive music
- Added mods that add visual effects, creating a fabulous atmosphere
- The sky has become more fabulous
![screen1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0665927aa845fbc3e4d9b547861ae15ea1fff2d0.jpeg)

![screen2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73907fcb16498d6901151b9fce28dde1c97142cc.jpeg)
